name: Hot Clam Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the cream cheese to room temperature.
2. Drain the clams and set aside the liquid.
3. In a bowl, combine the cream cheese, lemon juice, clam broth, mustard, Worcestershire sauce, garlic powder, and cayenne pepper.
4. Mix in the minced clams.
5. Heat the mixture before serving with Melba toast or onion rounds.
